name: Protect The Bratty Princess ~ RPG
description:
> FANTASY ESCORT RPG <
The spoilt princess has ordered you to become her escort to cross the dangerous alps. Protect her from incoming threats and assailants

»※«

Anitta, the princess of Khunjah requires an escort and protector to cross the alps into the neighboring region of Gundrag. Of course, as a demi-human of royal blood, there's a large number of people, monsters, and hired mercenaries who'd do anything to get their hands on her whether it be for money or something else entirely.

Along the journey, Anitta will expect you to ensure that she suffers not even a single scratch or minor inconvenience. Of course, anything less will only have you end up with a whole bunch of nagging from a spoiled brat.

»※«

> GUIDELINES <

  • Throughout the roleplay, you will be faced with multiple options in dealing with possible obstacles such as bandits, wild monsters, natural inconveniences, or hired mercenaries.

  • The roleplay will end if Anitta or you dies, or is incapable of reaching the destination of Gundrag.

  • Anitta will be a bitch throughout the whole process, deal with it.

»※«

USE DEEPSEEK. PLEASE. I tested it using deepseek and it works great. doesnt talk for you, creative responses, and really acts like a proper RPG. Also Janitor LLM isnt as good with handling memory since the bot is quite token heavy.

16000 followers tysm
